title: Spoiler Free Support Trauma Center
wikitext:
[]: Spoiler-Free Support / Trauma Center             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Jan 29, 2013 11:05 pm Starting this on inspiration from Oenara's post in "How long are you going to wait for 3.0?". The spoilered folks have had their own burgeoning subforum for over two months. Those of us going for the long haul should at least have our own thread, right? As the unofficial spokesperson for the unspoiled masses, I've taken it upon myself to get the ball rolling! So yeah. Post your gripes/stories from your efforts in trying to stay spoiler-free. Obviously, if you're posting about spoilers that you've seen, don't mention them directly in your post. I'd suggest being as vague as possible, but if you absolutely must post them remember to tag your spoilers! I guess I'll start us off. Whenever I finish an anime I like to look up the voice-actors to see if they've done any other characters that I know. I always end up scrolling away before my eyes can focus properly on the character's name, but I've found two VA's that are in 3.0 and not the other two Rebuilds or NGE.... Yeah, I know these aren't even really minor spoilers, but it's the most noteworthy thing that's happened to me recently. And I am very thankful for that.

[]:             Quote Post by BlackberryMilk » Wed Jan 30, 2013 1:02 pm I do the same thing Riffraff. I needed a Q intervention badly yesterday, I don't know how it happened but I came across a terrible quality camrip, and I almost clicked it. And whats more terrible? People I know that dont even WATCH the series accidentally slip spoilers in, I think everyones out to get me. By the way, what was the anime you completed?

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed Jan 30, 2013 1:05 pm BlackberryMilk wrote: By the way, what was the anime you completed?

[]:             Quote Post by Chiral_Spiral » Wed Jan 30, 2013 2:23 pm *Stands* My name is Chiral_Spiral, and I'm addicted to not reading spoilers Seriously though, the extent of my spoilerage is a few images from the theater art book thing, which I wouldn't really consider spoilers so much as teasers. I can maybe guess at the general direction the plat takes based on some of the images I've seen, but it's really nothing more than the back cover of a DVD would tell you. Still holding out hope for a screening. 2.0 was shown here in March so hopefully soon.....

[]:             Quote Post by Jadley » Wed Jan 30, 2013 5:38 pm Your efforts are futile and useless..... Join the dark side and we shall give you lots of explicit fan-arts.

[]:             Quote Post by Justacrazyguy » Wed Jan 30, 2013 5:55 pm This is reaching ridiculous levels. A freakin support group? When will a decent camrip come out so this madness can end?

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed Jan 30, 2013 6:04 pm Justacrazyguy wrote: This is reaching ridiculous levels. A freakin support group? When will a decent camrip come out so this madness can end?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Jan 30, 2013 11:43 pm It really isn't that hard to stay away. The world has far more things than anyone could possibly experience in a lifetime so restricting access to just one of them for a few months is no big deal.

[]:             Quote Post by BlackberryMilk » Thu Jan 31, 2013 12:37 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: It really isn't that hard to stay away. The world has far more things than anyone could possibly experience in a lifetime so restricting access to just one of them for a few months is no big deal.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Thu Jan 31, 2013 11:19 am for movie 1 and 2 I stayed spoiler free until the dvd was released in Japan. I watched a 3.0 camrip once subtitles were out.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Jan 31, 2013 4:08 pm MFW That 3.0 camrip uploaded to YouTube is at the top of the suggested videos on most of the videos I watch and when there are at least three different mentions of 3.0 on my YouTube homepage. I'm glad I decided to use my Subscriptions page in place of it.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Thu Jan 31, 2013 4:11 pm Should try logging out, see if that clears it up.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Jan 31, 2013 4:19 pm CJD wrote: Should try logging out, see if that clears it up.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Thu Jan 31, 2013 4:28 pm Didn't think about that. Ah well, short of making a temp account I don't know what else you can do. Is there a clear history option or something?

[]:             Quote Post by Oenara » Thu Jan 31, 2013 4:55 pm Thanks for starting this thread, riffraff11235! Let's see how many of us pure unicorns are left in the garden of innocence. If it's fine with you and our fellow spoilerphobes, I suggest expanding the thread purpose to include warnings/advice about spoilers on other sites (or Evageeks, if needed). Perhaps some of our spoilered friends could assist us (à la here and here - no spoilers in either linked thread). All right, here's my (ahem) trauma report: Spoiled for 2-3 major plot developments, including one for the finale, plus a bunch of miscellanea that could be anything from trivial details to huge spoilers for all I know. As I mentioned in the other thread , this is the first time I've tried to stay unspoiled for a work of this magnitude, and let's just say I severely underestimated how discreet people (especially on Tumblr) would be. Lesson learned, but I still trip over spoilers, mostly by searching the web for Eva stuff. BlackberryMilk wrote: Says the person who probably has life :3 I pretty much don't outside of work haha. It's all meant in jest anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Jan 31, 2013 4:59 pm CJD wrote: Didn't think about that. Ah well, short of making a temp account I don't know what else you can do. Is there a clear history option or something?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Jan 31, 2013 6:06 pm BlackberryMilk wrote: Says the person who probably has life :3 I pretty much don't outside of work haha.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Jan 31, 2013 6:08 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: But seriously, there's a billion other hobbies.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Fri Feb 01, 2013 10:10 am Oenara wrote: If it's fine with you and our fellow spoilerphobes, I suggest expanding the thread purpose to include warnings/advice about spoilers on other sites (or Evageeks, if needed). Perhaps some of our spoilered friends could assist us

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Fri Feb 01, 2013 12:14 pm CJD wrote: If we're doing this then, for it to be effective, you guys need to check this thread right away when you log on, before checking any other thread. That way if you see one of us post something like "Avoid X Thread at the moment while we wait for a mod" you will know immediately. The reason I'm specifying this is that my fear is by saying "There's spoilers here." any ambiguity to whether the post in question is spoilers will be gone, so anyone who saw that post before reading the warning will now know it's an official 3.0 spoiler.
